summary: Validated backend proxy hardening and frontend wallet/status UX additions against public preview URL. All requested backend endpoints and UI flows passed.
action_items: No blocking defects found for requested scope.
Optional: add one automated UI regression script file in-repo for banner/checklist/activity checks to reuse in future iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified on https://quick-fix-71.preview.emergentagent.com using REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Wallet extension is unavailable in automation, so wallet connection/auth signing was not executed; UI guidance states and sections were validated.
rca of the issue: No failures reproduced in this test run. Async proxy hardening appears effective: /api/ping, /api/gamma/markets, /api/clob/time, and /api/polygon all returned successful responses under regression checks.
mocked_api: NO MOCKED APIs used in this testing run
